The '''T-15 snub rifle''' was a powerful infantry weapon produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]] under the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. Heavier than a standard [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]], it was sometimes carried by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squad leaders.<ref name="OOAK" />
